description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CTest (BVTs) that runs on push to main and on pull requests to main, ignoring certain paths. Use a Windows 2022 job with read permissions to repository contents. In a matrix build with multiple tool versions, build types, and architectures, check out the repository, clone a test repository, install Ninja, set up the MSVC development environment, configure CMake, build the project, and run basic validation tests (BVTs) with CTest.
